First Open-Set Medical Degradation Benchmark

MedQ-Deg

A Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Medical Image Degradation Recognition

6
Categories
28
Degradation Types
4
Datasets
Read Paper GitHub Explore Benchmark

Degradation Categories

Medical images suffer from various types of degradation. Our benchmark covers 6 major categories with 28 specific degradation types.

◐

Blur

模糊

▥

Noise

噪声

⚠

Artifact

伪影

◑

Contrast

对比度

⤢

Compression

压缩

⋯

Other

其他

Key Contributions

We propose a comprehensive benchmark and novel methods for medical image degradation recognition.

📊

MedQ-Deg Benchmark

First comprehensive benchmark for medical image degradation recognition with 28 degradation types across 6 categories

🧠

DPL Method

Degradation-aware Prompt Learning with learnable prompts and prototype-based unknown detector

🔄

DPT Framework

Degradation Prompt Transfer for downstream task adaptation with degradation-aware prompts
